institutional_knowledge.logic: Orientation is the highest-cost agent task. Domain-specific indices (Documentation Shields) are mandatory to reduce token burn by 30-40%.
Files exceeding 50 lines must be distilled or surgically read. Direct reading of large files is a context-window violation.
All filesystem mutations must be performed via MCP supervisors. Raw shell writes are forbidden for security and auditability.
No task is 'Complete' without a Three-Pass Saveup (Fact, Learn, Ponder) to fuel compounding memory.
